content.query:
-- create county to zip3 mortality distribution based on HEII and CDC mortality data
create table dim.mortality_county_to_zip3_distribution_t
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
	CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
) as
with base as
(
  select 
    county_code, age_lower_bound, age_upper_bound, gender, sum(deaths) as deaths, sum(population) as population, sum(deaths) / sum(population) as mortality_rate
  from dim.mortality_2023_rate_t
  group by 
    county_code, age_lower_bound, age_upper_bound, gender
),
gender_tab as
(
  select 
    county_code, age_lower_bound, age_upper_bound, gender, deaths, population
  from base
  union all
  select 
    county_code, age_lower_bound, age_upper_bound, 'U' as gender, sum(deaths) as deaths, sum(population) as population
  from base
  group by 
    county_code, age_lower_bound, age_upper_bound
),
age_tab as
(
  select 
    county_code, age_lower_bound, age_upper_bound, gender, deaths, population, mortality_rate
  from base
  union all
  select 
    county_code, -1 as age_lower_bound, -1 as age_upper_bound, gender, sum(deaths) as deaths, sum(population) as population, sum(deaths) / sum(population) as mortality_rate
  from gender_tab
  group by 
    county_code, gender
),
mortality_rate_tab as
(
  select 
    a.CountyName as county_name, 
    a.FIPSStateCounty as fips_state_county,
    substring(a.zip, 1, 3) as zip3,
    count(*) as population,
    coalesce(sum(b.mortality_rate), 0) as deaths
  from 
    opt.heii_t a
    inner join age_tab b
      on coalesce(floor(a.AgeInYears), -1) between b.age_lower_bound and b.age_upper_bound 
      and a.gender = b.gender
      and a.FIPSStateCounty = b.county_code
  where
    a.FIPSStateCounty is not null and a.zip is not null
  group by
    a.CountyName, 
    a.FIPSStateCounty,
    substring(a.zip, 1, 3)
)
select
  a.county_name, a.fips_state_county, a.zip3, a.population, a.deaths
  , case when sum(a.deaths) over (partition by a.county_name, a.fips_state_county) > 0 then a.deaths / sum(a.deaths) over (partition by a.county_name, a.fips_state_county) 
  else a.population / sum(a.population) over (partition by a.county_name, a.fips_state_county)
  end as mortality_county_to_zip3_ratio
from mortality_rate_tab a
;

create table dim.mortality_2023_by_zip3_t
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
	CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
) as
with county_w_1_zip3 as 
(
  select distinct
    a.fips_state_county, substring(zip, 1, 3) as zip3, b.cnt_zip3
  from dim.hud_zip_county_crosswalk_t a
    inner join
    (
      select fips_state_county, count(distinct substring(zip, 1, 3)) as cnt_zip3
      from dim.hud_zip_county_crosswalk_t a
      group by fips_state_county
    ) b
      on a.fips_state_county = b.fips_state_county and b.cnt_zip3 = 1
)
select
  coalesce(b.zip3, c.zip3) as zip3, a.age_group, a.age_lower_bound, a.age_upper_bound, a.gender, a.month, sum(a.deaths * coalesce(b.mortality_county_to_zip3_ratio, 1)) as deaths
from 
  dim.mortality_2023_monthly_t a
  left join dim.mortality_county_to_zip3_distribution_t b
    on a.county_code = b.fips_state_county
  left join county_w_1_zip3 c
    on b.fips_state_county is null and a.county_code = c.fips_state_county
group by 
  coalesce(b.zip3, c.zip3), a.age_group, a.age_lower_bound, a.age_upper_bound, a.gender, a.month
union all
select
  a.zip3, a.age_group, a.age_lower_bound, a.age_upper_bound, a.gender, a.month, a.deaths
from 
  dim.mortality_pr_2022_by_zip3_t a
;

create table dim.mortality_2023_by_zip3_age_t
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
	CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
) as
WITH numbers as (
  SELECT TOP 200  -- Adjust this number as needed
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY (SELECT NULL)) - 1 as number
  FROM sys.objects a 
)
select 
  a.zip3, b.number as age, a.gender, a.month, 
  -- the breakdown for age 0 is not right, but ok for now since we do not have minor mortality data in the blend
  a.deaths / (case when a.age_group = '85+' then a.age_lower_bound else a.age_upper_bound end - a.age_lower_bound + 1) as deaths
from 
  dim.mortality_2023_by_zip3_t a
  inner join numbers b
   on b.number between a.age_lower_bound and case when a.age_group = '85+' then a.age_lower_bound else a.age_upper_bound end
;
